title: limonium suffruticosum
intro: Limonium suffruticosum, also known as dwarf sea lavender or suffruticose sea lavender, is a low-growing, perennial shrub native to the coastal regions of Europe and North Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Limonium suffruticosum include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral activities. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
